findings.fix: 14 Commits in 30 Tagen — erwäge Datei aufzuteilen. 2 Autoren — Ownership klären. 7 defektorientierte Commits — Stabilisiere durch Tests und Code-Review.

findings.title: High volatility: src/drift/signals/pattern_fragmentation.py
findings.description: Change frequency: 2.1/week (1.7σ above mean). 2 unique authors (1.8σ above mean). 6 defect-correlated commits (2.1σ above mean).
findings.fix: 9 Commits in 30 Tagen — erwäge Datei aufzuteilen. 2 Autoren — Ownership klären. 6 defektorientierte Commits — Stabilisiere durch Tests und Code-Review.

findings.title: High volatility: tests/test_smoke_real_repos.py
findings.description: 2 unique authors (1.8σ above mean).
findings.fix: 2 Autoren — Ownership klären.

findings.title: Circular import cycle (2 modules)
findings.description: File-level import cycle detected: tests/fixtures/tsjs_graph_relative/components/button.tsx → tests/fixtures/tsjs_graph_relative/lib/util.ts → tests/fixtures/tsjs_graph_relative/components/button.tsx
findings.fix: Break the cycle by extracting shared types into a common module.

findings.title: Circular import cycle (2 modules)
findings.description: File-level import cycle detected: tests/fixtures/tsjs_rule_cycles/positive/src/a.ts → tests/fixtures/tsjs_rule_cycles/positive/src/b.ts → tests/fixtures/tsjs_rule_cycles/positive/src/a.ts
findings.fix: Break the cycle by extracting shared types into a common module.

findings.title: Guard clause deficit in scripts/
findings.description: 7/7 public functions lack guard clauses (guarded ratio 0.0%, mean unguarded complexity 6.3).
findings.fix: Add guard clauses to validate inputs early: isinstance checks, None guards, or assert statements.

findings.title: Happy-path-only test suite in tests/
findings.description: 437 test functions with 720 positive / 2 negative assertions (negative ratio 0.3%). 64 boundary-named tests.
findings.fix: Add negative tests: use pytest.raises for expected exceptions, test edge cases (empty, None, invalid input).
